message:
feat(freeze): Add push_const opcode support for constant pool access

Enables frozen functions to access constant pool values (int32, float64,
string, bool, null, undefined). Complex constants (objects, arrays) fall
back to unsupported.

Changes:
- codegen_ssa.zig: Handle push_const/push_const8 with constant lookup
- main.zig: Pass func.constants to CodeGenOptions

Test: /tmp/const_test with int, float, string constants - all pass
